title: OPGE
description: Mods for optimization and QoL, which I personally use.
body:
## OPGE-Optimum Performance and Gameplay Enhancement

![comparing minecraft vanilla with my build but not using the fresh animation resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VHdNC4cq/images/c5ba08856b9fedd84e185c18dfa099101f0529a4.png)

## Description

OPGE is a modpack for Minecraft created to enhance the gaming experience. It includes client mods that enhance graphics, animations, and effects, making the game more lively and intense.

Customize the game for yourself, use advanced automation and improved mechanics to increase efficiency.

OPGE is not just a modpack, but a powerful set of improvements for maximum enjoyment of Minecraft Vanilla. Install and discover new facets of your favorite game!

## Resource packs

For the best gaming experience, I advise you to install these resource packs

- [Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons)
- [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode)
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#e1W3EK)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
- [In-Game Brewing Guide](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/in-game-brewing-guide)
- [Shiny Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shiny-ores-countxd)

In addition, for all resource packs to work correctly, I recommend using them in the same order as in the image below

![resource packs you need for the best gaming experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VHdNC4cq/images/103a23f5b3ab4b778cdd7f01fbffc8d2b44d9423.png)

#

### [Benchmark map that was used in the comparative test](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/minecraft-benchmark-v3/)
